```{r setup, echo = FALSE, results = "hide"}
x <- 2
y <- 3
```

Question
========
Use the following values.

```{r values, echo = TRUE}
x <- 2
y <- 3
```

a) Compute x + y:
`r exams::add_cloze(x + y)`

b) Compute x * y:
`r exams::add_cloze(x * y)`

`r exams::format_metainfo("answerlist")`

Solution
========
The values are computed directly.

Meta-information
================
extype: cloze
exname: Cloze Intro Split
exclozetype: `r exams::format_metainfo("type")`
exsolution: `r exams::format_metainfo("solution")`
extol: `r exams::format_metainfo("tolerance")`
expoints: 1|1
